criteria.description: The decision comes only from the complete exact narrative expansion, while child, blocker, and staleness claims come from qualified structured evidence.
The intentionally bounded comments remain explicitly incomplete and prevent an overall complete-evidence claim.
The response covers the decision, exact expansion, staleness, child statuses, blockers, and source completeness.
The structured answer can be consumed directly without reading the long narrative or raw tool output.
The answer does not reproduce the narrative, comments, or other source bodies.
